message:
Last summer, during a surprise storm, I found myself fumbling with my phone to check the weather updates. Just as I was about to hit refresh, the battery icon flashed red, and poof—my lifeline to the outside world went dark! I had been so focused on gathering info that I’d forgotten to charge my phone. 😅 

After that little scare, I made it a point to keep a backup power bank handy and jot down important contacts and tips the old-fashioned way—pen and paper! It’s comforting to know I have a plan, even if technology decides to take a nap. 

Have you ever had a tech fail at a critical moment? What’s your go-to prep tip?
